text:
Remove broken on 9.x since it no more true - it builds and install fine on 9.0-BETA1 i386:
"""
===>  Configuring for curvedns-0.88.b_1
===>   configuring may take a couple of minutes
Finished configuring CurveDNS, ready for compiling.
Chosen/picked ABI:		x86
Chosen/picked compiler:		gcc
Chosen/picked compiler options:	-m32 -O3 -fomit-frame-pointer -funroll-loops

We are now ready to compile, run 'make' to do so.
rm@smeshariki3$ sudo make
===>  Building for curvedns-0.88.b_1
"""
